You can add +6 to the final score of the spell if you have a corpse. However, it must _not_ be in a state where it would die immediately even if it came back to life, such as a decapitated corpse, etc. The same goes for rotting corpses. These corpses will only be treated as _something connected to the dead person_ . If they died due to poison, etc. or if their life force was dealt damage by weapons or magic, you must cast _Cure Poison_ or _Cure Wounds_ beforehand. 

Immediately after being resurrected, they have almost no ability to act. It takes one week for the body to return to its normal state and to be able to function without hindrance. 

## **10th Level Basic Holy Magic List** 

## **[ Call God ]** 

Base Mental Power Cost=50 

Distance=Caster Area=Caster Duration=10 minutes 

Effect=Temporarily summons the god the caster worships 

Type=Target score Expansion=Final score, duration Resist=None 

When you chant this spell, you can summon a major god into your own body. Even gods who have lost contact with the material world will be able to use their full power if summoned with this spell. However, the effect of the spell is temporary, and moreover, humans' frail bodies and minds cannot withstand the great power of a god, so after the spell's duration has expired, the caster's soul is destroyed, and even if you use 

spells such as _Resurrection_ etc. you will _not_ be able to bring them back to life again. 

## **[ Save Soul ]** 

Base Mental Power Cost=40 Distance=Touch Area=One Soul Duration=Instant Effect=Rescue an undead soul Type=Ritual Expansion=Final score Resist=Negated effect 

There are several cases in which a normal life form becomes undead. Those that have had their mental power (points) taken away by other undead (wights, lesser vampires, etc.), those created by magic (skeleton, zombies, etc.), those created by their own will (haunts, undead kings, etc.), and there are also things such as ghouls whose causes are still unknown. In either case, if you become undead, your soul will become abnormal and you will not be able to be resurrected even if _Resurrection_ is used normally. 

This spell saves the souls of those who have become undead. If the undead agrees, the spell is almost guaranteed to succeed (with the exception of double ones), but otherwise you must attain a final score greater than or equal to the undead's mental point resistance. 

If the spell is successful, the undead will cease all activity at that point. If you then cast _Resurrection_ , it is also possible to restore their life. 

One priest can only attempt one _Save Soul_ against a given undead. If you fail, you _cannot_ try again until your magic power increases. 

104

**Table 5-8: Reincarnation Memory** 

|Final Score|Time to regain memories|
|---|---|
|20 or less|Memories cannot be regained naturally|
|21|30 years|
|22|20 years|
|23|10 years|
|24 or greater|5 years|



## **[ Reincarnation ]** 

## **[ Rescue ]** 

Base Mental Power Cost=50 Distance=Touch Area=One Duration=Until reincarnated Effect=Reincarnate a soul into a new body Type=Ritual Expansion=Final score Resist=None 

Base Mental Power Cost=50 Distance=Caster 

Area=Up to 10 people within a 10 meter radius of the caster 

Duration=Instant Effect=Help the party escape to a safe place Type=Expansion=Targets as well as area Resist=None 

This spell is cast immediately after an individual's death. The soul of the target of this spell will be reborn as a baby in another location within one week. Reborn babies have their ability scores preserved (they have the same ability scores after becoming adults). As the baby grows up, at a certain moment it’ll remember its former personality. At that stage they will be able to use all their previous memories and skills. When they remember their previous personality depends on the final score from when the spell was cast (see Table 5-8: Reincarnation Memory). 

When you cast this spell, the hand of the gods will help the caster and their companions escape to a safe location (the caster's home, a temple, a familiar city, etc.). 

By expanding the effect of this spell, you can simultaneously increase the area of effect as well as the number of people it targets. If you _double_ the mental power consumed, it will target _20_ people within a _14_ meter radius, and if you _triple_ it, it will target _30_ people within a _17_ meter radius. 

The caster can remove anything from the target of this spell, even within the area of effect. Conversely, you _cannot_ force this spell to take effect on those who do _not_ agree to it. 

Even before a person regains their personality, if someone who knew them well before reincarnation can identify their body after reincarnation, they can try to restore the person's old memories. You can help them recover their memory through constant supervision, so you can roll 2D once every year, and if you roll a 10 or greater, they will be able to regain their personality. 

## **5.1.17 Special Holy Magic List** 

The spells listed here can only be used by those who believe in a specific god among characters with the priest skill. 

## **Pharis Special Holy Magic List [ Sense Evil ] (Spell Level=1)** 

Base Mental Power Cost=4 Distance=10 meters 

Area=One Duration=Instant 

Effect=Read the evil thoughts in an opponent's mind Type=Detection Expansion=Distance, targets Resist=None 

_Sense Evil_ is a spell that allows you to see through those who harbor (so-called evil) feelings that would destroy the justice and order taught by Pharis. Think of this spell _not_ as constantly detecting people called _villains_ , but only the _moment_ when someone is thinking _evil thoughts_ . In other words, this spell works on the _evil intent_ of those that have minds, but is _not_ a spell that detects _people_ who commonly have evil intent (these kinds of people are usually called villains). 

**[ Banish ] (Spell Level=8)** 

Base Mental Power Cost=32 

Distance=30 meters Area=One individual Duration=Instant 

Effect=Remove what isn't natural from the material world 

Type=Counters (Overpowers): _Summon magic_ Expansion=Final score, distance, targets Resist=Negated effect 

This is a spell that erases unnatural beings belonging to spirits, undead, daemons, and magical creatures from the material world. If a target who had this spell cast on it fails to resist, it 

105 



instantly vanishes from the material world. 

This spell has no effect on humans, fae, youma, titans, mythical beasts, magical beasts, animals, titan creatures, plants, etc. However, creatures summoned by _summon_ dragon roar magic can be targeted by this spell 

## **[ Jihad ] (Spell Level=10)** 

Base Mental Power Cost=50 

Distance=Caster 

Area=All believers of Pharis within the caster's view 

Duration=1 week 

Effect=Gives great fighting ability to believers of Pharis 

Type=Ritual, mind, target score Expand=Final score, duration Resist=None 

This spell is used when a high priest of Pharis discovers a great evil that absolutely cannot be overlooked. Gather as many Pharis believers as you can to a temple, and cast this in front of them. As a result, anyone who agrees to the spell, including the person who cast it, will experience the following effects. 

1. Temporarily increase fighter skill level by 2 (+2 bonus to attack power, evasion speed, and damage. Those with fighter skill 0 will be temporarily given 2 levels) 2. Absolute obedience to the caster's commands (even if it is a suicidal act) 

It has no impact at all on those who do not agree to the spell, but _no_ devout follower of Pharis would not agree to the high priest's spell. The caster can also exclude anyone from the spell, even if another person willingly agrees. 

## **Myrii Special Holy Magic List** 

## **[ Battle Song ] (Spell Level=5)** 

Base Mental Power Cost=20 

Distance=Caster 

Area=A range within which the caster's singing voice can be heard 

Duration=As long as you keep singing 

Effect=+2 attack power to those who listen to the song 

Type=Mind, target score Expansion=Final score Resist=None 

As the god of war, Myrii is said to lend his power to those who fight justly. Priests of Myrii can receive Myrii's assistance by offering a song in holy prayer to Myrii. Basically, this spell takes effect on anything within the reach of the caster's singing voice, but the caster can also exclude any target from being targeted by the spell when casting the spell. Those under the influence of this spell gain a +2 bonus to attack power. Unlike _focus_ magic, this spell will _not_ be interrupted even if the caster suffers damage, but the spell _cannot_ be maintained if the caster takes any other voluntary action. 

## **[ Divine Armor ] (Spell Level=7)** 

Base Mental Power Cost=21 

Distance=Caster Area=Caster Duration=18 rounds 

Effect=Create an armor-like force field with defense power 30 

Type=Target score Expansion=Final score, duration Resist=None 

When you cast this spell, a force field surrounds the caster, acting as armor with defense power 30. This armor appears to glow vaguely. There is no required strength, and it does not hinder the caster's movement at all. Even if the caster is already wearing armor, their defense power does _not_ stack (the defense power of the armor you were wearing will be nullified). 

## **[ Divine Weapon ] (Spell Level=7)** 

Base Mental Power Cost=21 Distance=Caster Area=Caster Duration=18 rounds Effect=Create a weapon-like force field with strike power 30 Type=Target score Expansion=Final score, duration Resist=None 

When you cast this spell, a vaguely glowing weapon-like force field appears in the caster's hand. The shape depends on the caster's preference. There is no required strength, and its strike power is treated as 30 (if the caster uses it as a twohanded weapon, its strike power is _35_ ). This spell has no effect if the caster already has something else in their hand. Also, it's not possible to give this _weapon_ to someone else. This _weapon_ can also take effect against monsters that can only be wounded by silver or magic weapons. When you create a bow, etc. with this spell, arrows are automatically generated as well. 

## **Rahda Special Holy Magic List [ Inspiration ] (Spell Level=3)** 

Base Mental Power Cost=3 

Distance=Caster 

Area=Caster 

Duration=Until the caster falls asleep Effect=You can turn a failed success roll related to _knowledge_ into a success only once Type=Non-removable Expansion=Resist=None 

If you cast this spell, you can turn a failure into a success only _once_ on a success roll to see if you know something, such as _appraise treasure_ or _monster check_ . If a knowledge-related success roll _fails_ , the player can optionally make it a _success_ . 

This spell cannot be recast until the caster falls asleep. 

## **[ Weak Point ] (Spell Level=3)** 

Base Mental Power Cost=15 Distance=10 meters Area=One Duration=18 rounds 

Effect=Find the target's weak point, reducing the critical target of anyone who attacks them by -1 Type=Target score Expansion=Final score, duration, distance, targets Resist=Negated effect 

106 



This spell shows you your target's weak point and guides your attack there. This effect is expressed as a -1 to the attacker's critical target. In other words, the normal critical target of 10 becomes _9_ (9 to _8_ for a thief). 

Note that the critical target can only be lowered for _weapon_ attacks, while the critical target of damage magic _cannot_ be lowered. 

If a character has this spell cast on them and a monster with fixed strike points attacks, the character's defense roll will be affected. In this case, even if the defense roll result is not only 2 (double ones) but also _3_ , no damage reduction will be possible. 

## **[ Legend ] (Spell Level=7)** 

Base Mental Power Cost=28 

Distance=Touch 

Area=One 

Duration=Permanent 

Effect=Make the target memorize text Type=Non-removable Expansion=Text amount (see explanation) Resist=None 

This is a spell for passing down oral instruction. The caster can make the target of the spell memorize specific text without error. 

The text must be limited to 10 sentences. Also, it must be pronounced and heard directly. This spell allows you to increase the amount of text your target memorizes by expanding its effect (for example, they can memorize up to _20_ sentences of text if you consume _double_ the mental power). 

For reference, this spell's description, including this last part, is 8 sentences long. In other words, text of this amount can be easily memorized. 

## **Cha Za Special Holy Magic List** 

## **[ Luck ] (Spell Level=1)** 

Base Mental Power Cost=1 Distance=Caster Area=Caster Duration=Until the caster falls asleep 

Effect=You can turn a failed success roll into a success only once Type=Non-removable Expansion=Resist=None 

Cha Za's power as the god of luck is said to bestow good fortune on the caster through the hand of an invisible god. If you cast this spell, you can turn a failure into a success only _once_ on a success roll. However, the effect of this spell is limited to the following: 

1. Evasion rolls against attacks 

2. Resistance rolls against magic, etc. 

3. Death checks when life force becomes 0 or less 

4. Other _defensive_ success rolls approved by the game master. 

A _defensive_ success roll should be judged by whether it means you _luckily survived_ . If the game master is unsure, treat it as something where it _can't_ be used. In particular, it can _never_ be used on checks for hitting others with attacks or checks for casting magic. 

This spell cannot be recast until the caster falls asleep. 

## **[ Guard Trading ] (Spell Level=5)** 

Base Mental Power Cost=25 

Distance=Caster Area=Within the caster's view Duration=1 day 

Effect=You can see who is trying to engage in illegal business transactions with the caster Type=Detection, target score Expansion=Final score, duration Resist=None 

This is a spell for protecting trade. If you try to engage in an illegal business transaction with the caster who cast this spell (e.g. trying to sell for more than the intended price, trying to buy for less than the intended price, etc.), the caster will discover it immediately. Also, when someone tries to steal or take something from the caster, it will be discovered because it means they're trying to buy it for _free = less than the intended price_ . 

## **Marfa Special Holy Magic List** 

## **[ Peace ]** 

## **(Spell Level=3)** 

Base Mental Power Cost=15 

Distance=Caster 

Area=A space within a 10 meter radius from the caster 

Duration=1 hour 

Effect=Takes away hostility from targets within the area of effect 

Type=Mind, target score 

Expansion=Final score, duration, area Resist=Negated effect 

Marfa, as the earth mother and the goddess of affection, preaches strong warnings against unnecessary conflict. Therefore, priests of Marfa can use this spell to take away the feelings of hatred that have arisen in each other's hearts and prevent them from fighting. Those who fail to resist will lose their hostility and attempt to stop the fight. At this point, if the opponent attempts to take hostile action again, this becomes a natural battle for Marfa, so you can counterattack. This spell has no effect on those without a mind, or when it is natural for them to attack another due to hunger, etc. 

## **[ Return Home ] (Spell Level=6)** 

Base Mental Power Cost=24 

Distance=Caster 

Area=Caster 

Duration=Instant 

Effect=Help the caster escape to a safe place Type=Expansion=Resist=None 

When you cast this spell, the hand of the gods will help the caster escape to a safe location (the caster's home, a temple, a familiar city, etc.). 

## **Braki Special Holy Magic List** 

## **[ Sense Metal ] (Spell Level=3)** 

Base Mental Power Cost=9 

Distance=Caster 

Area=A space within a 30 meter radius from the caster 

107

Duration=18 rounds 

Effect=Sense the type, purity, and amount of surrounding metals and veins Type=Detection 

Expansion=Duration, area Resist=None 

_Sense Metal_ is a spell that allows you to sense metals or veins containing metals in the surrounding area, as well as their type, purity, and amount. For the duration of the spell, the priest of Braki will see their surroundings in a unique color. You can determine the quality of a metal by its color, its purity by its strength, and the amount by what you can see in range. No material can block the effects of this spell. 

## **[ Heat Metal ]** 

**(Spell Level=5)** 

Base Mental Power Cost=25 

Distance=30 centimeters 

Area=One piece of metal up to 10 kilograms Duration=Until focus ends 

Effect=Makes metal red hot so it can be processed 

Type=Focus 

Expansion=Final score, distance, target's weight (See description) Resist=None 

By casting this spell, a priest of Braki can make a mass of metal red-hot, making it soft enough to be processed. If cast on (metal) armor, etc. the wearer will suffer severe burns. If _Heat Metal_ is cast on armor worn, the wearer will suffer strike power 10 damage to their life force (points) each round. This damage can only be reduced by adventurer level or magic. Even if metal parts are layered on a foundation such as leather, the damage cannot be reduced because the foundation will quickly become damaged. 

This heating of metal is magical, so if the caster's focus is broken, the targeted metal mass instantly loses its heat. 

Please note the magic's reach distance (30 centimeters). In the middle of combat, it can only be used on enemies that are _engaged_ with you, and if you suffer damage from an enemy's counterattack, your focus will be broken and the magic's effect will be lost. 

By expanding the effect of this spell, you can increase the weight of the target metal mass. You can increase the weight of metal that can be affected by _20_ kilograms by consuming _double_ the mental power, _40_ kilograms by consuming _quadruple_ the mental power...... etc. 

## **5.2** 

## **Common Runes** 

**Common runes** were invented by Mana Rai, the great sage of Oran, and it involves putting the power of ancient magic into items (mainly rings) and activating it using a password in _common_ . 

Common runes, like other magic, consume mental power when used. The amount of mental power consumed is determined by each common rune. 

Common runes can be used by anyone who knows the password. Also, even if you can't use your hands or are wearing metal armor, you can use them as long as you can say the word. However, no matter how high your rune master skill is, you _cannot_ reduce the amount of mental power consumed. When using common runes, if magic power is required for a game procedure, treat it as **0** regardless of the user. Common runes can also be expanded by consuming extra mental power. However, increasing the final score is the one thing you _cannot_ do. 

Theoretically, any ancient magic can be made into common runes, but the sorcerers' guild (academy of sages) limits what gets put on the market, to prevent the reputation of magic and sorcerers 

from being damaged due to misuse of magic. 

The following are common runes that characters can obtain. However, _Decrease Weight_ will not appear on the market as a common rune if it's lost to 

## **Table 5-9: Common Runes** 

Enchant Weapon (Mental Power Consumed 3, 3000 Gamels) Counterspell (Mental Power Consumed 3, 3000 Gamels) Decrease Weight (Mental Power Consumed 3, 3000 Gamels) Kindle (Mental Power Consumed 3, 3000 Gamels) Protection (Mental Power Consumed 3, 3000 Gamels) Light (Mental Power Consumed 3, 3000 Gamels) Lock (Mental Power Consumed 3, 3000 Gamels)
